title: Change the Liuyao calendar day at midnight or late Zi

positions.summary: Use the civil date through 23:59 by default.
Advance the day pillar at 23:00 when zi_initial is explicitly selected.

default_policy.rationale: Midnight is deterministic and matches the shared default; late Zi remains explicit.

user_disclosure: The recorded day-boundary setting can change day-derived spirits and void branches.
